brigandine.name: Brigandine
brigandine.description: Riveted steel plates sewn inside a stout leather coat — flexible and tough.

banded_mail.name: Banded Mail
banded_mail.description: Overlapping steel bands over a mail hauberk — a veteran soldier's standard.

fortified_plate.name: Fortified Plate
fortified_plate.description: Full plate reforged with reinforcing ribs, proof against all but the heaviest blows.

dragonscale_mail.name: Dragonscale Mail
dragonscale_mail.description: A hauberk of overlapping wyrm-scales — nigh impervious, and warm against the cold of the deep.

aegis_of_dawn.name: Aegis of Dawn
aegis_of_dawn.description: Radiant plate said to have turned an Elder Wyrm's breath. It glows faintly at the approach of evil.

steel_shield.name: Steel Shield
steel_shield.description: A heavy kite of forged steel; it turns a blade with a bright ring.
